title: Recursive Maze Solver
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a recursive LISP code that solves a maze where a 2x2 character can move in any direction (up, down, left, right) and finds the shortest path to the target (a designated character '#'). The maze is represented as a 2D list of characters, where '0' is an empty space and '1' is a wall. The code should use a recursive depth-first search (DFS) algorithm.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct LISP syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (LISP syntax and recursive function definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive DFS algorithm for maze solving.
